title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Madras City Civil Court Act, 1892; 1 *** 2 * * * * *
footnote: 1. The word "and" omitted by Act 17 of 1914, s. 3 and the Second Schedule (w.e.f. 16-9-1914). 2. Sub-section (2) omitted by s. 3 and the Second Schedule, ibid. (w.e.f. 16-9-1914).
